name: Programming
description: Writing, explaining, and debugging code across languages. Anything that must be verified to actually run is delegated to a code-runner tool, not trusted from the model.
author: your-name

routing.description_for_router: Use this pack for anything about writing, reading, explaining, fixing, or reasoning about source code and software.

tools.name: code_runner
tools.description: Executes a code snippet in a sandbox and returns stdout, stderr, and exit code. Use to verify that generated code actually runs and produces the claimed output.
